findings.message: execution-brief gate run: quality_check + artifact_gate PASS; alignment check PASS; self-check PASS
Control-plane reports allow Stage Gate to continue

ai_interpretation: breakdown 阶段执行授权全部满足：delivery-slicer 产出 execution-brief.md（7 父任务 PT-01~PT-07 + 15 原子任务，每父任务内嵌 atomic_task_queue.status=ready + 同 ID 详情块），test-planning-expert 绑定任务级/原子级测试义务矩阵（NEG-01~07 必失断言、RISK-05 主观项截图+样式双证据、GAP-D1 裸枚举双处穷举、PT-01 纯函数单测 accepted_alternative）。切片枢纽审查 execution-plan-effectiveness-reviewer PASS（父任务按呈现作用面纵切、PT-05 LayoutController CSS-only 判断独立复核成立），BG-1 覆盖矩阵幽灵 ID 已就地修复。全量有效性审查 execution-plan-effectiveness-reviewer PASS（迭代授权/DoD/证据/停止齐全、原子队列文件级可执行、边界无越界、依赖无环风险前置、9/9 SUC-xx-OP-xx + 25/25 ADDED Scenario 追溯实指、代码模式参考真实 src file:line）。外部动作契约 execution-brief.contract.yaml 填入 T001~T007 action_contract（traces_to/authorized_paths/prohibited_paths/required_evidence/tdd_scope/test_obligation/e2e_obligation/stop_if/atomic_task_queue/dependencies），共享文件写入经 direct 依赖边串行无冲突。程序化门全绿：execution-brief gate run（quality_check+artifact_gate PASS）、alignment check PASS、self-check PASS、spec check-coverage strict 25/25 覆盖 PASS。interaction 经治理档跳过，prototype_coverage_exemptions=[]，agent_implementation=[]。
